# Color

## Overview

Eggo uses a neutral gray palette with orange accent for the "baseplate" theme and monochrome for the "mono" theme. Colors are organized in three tiers: primitive palette (Layer 1) → semantic theme tokens (Layer 2) → component usage (Layer 3).

## Color Modes

- **Dark** (default): Gray-950 background, light text
- **Light**: Gray-50 background, dark text
- **System**: Follows OS preference via `prefers-color-scheme`

Color mode is set via `data-theme` attribute on the root element. Values: `dark`, `light`, or unset (system).

## UI Themes

- **Baseplate** (default): Orange accent color for interactive elements
- **Mono**: Monochrome palette — light buttons on dark, dark buttons on light. No orange.

UI theme is set via `data-ui-theme` attribute. Value: `mono` or unset (baseplate).

## Primitive Palette

### Neutrals

| Token | Value | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `--color-white` | `#ffffff` | Pure white |
| `--color-black` | `#000000` | Pure black |
| `--color-gray-50` | `#fafafa` | Lightest gray |
| `--color-gray-100` | `#f4f4f5` |  |
| `--color-gray-200` | `#e4e4e7` |  |
| `--color-gray-300` | `#d4d4d8` |  |
| `--color-gray-400` | `#a1a1aa` |  |
| `--color-gray-500` | `#71717a` | Mid gray |
| `--color-gray-600` | `#52525b` |  |
| `--color-gray-700` | `#3f3f46` |  |
| `--color-gray-800` | `#27272a` |  |
| `--color-gray-850` | `#1f1f23` | Non-standard step |
| `--color-gray-900` | `#18181b` |  |
| `--color-gray-950` | `#09090b` | Darkest gray |

### Accent — Orange

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--color-orange-400` | `#fb923c` |
| `--color-orange-500` | `#f97316` |
| `--color-orange-600` | `#ea580c` |

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--color-red-500` | `#ef4444` |
| `--color-red-600` | `#dc2626` |
| `--color-yellow-400` | `#facc15` |
| `--color-yellow-500` | `#eab308` |
| `--color-blue-500` | `#3b82f6` |

### Status

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--color-success` | `#22c55e` |
| `--color-warning` | `#f59e0b` |

## Semantic Tokens (themed)

### Surfaces

| Token | Dark | Light | Usage |
|-------|------|-------|-------|
| `--surface-background` | `--color-gray-950 (#09090b)` | `--color-gray-50 (#fafafa)` | Page background |
| `--surface-primary` | `--color-gray-900 (#18181b)` | `--color-white (#ffffff)` | Card backgrounds, primary surfaces |
| `--surface-secondary` | `--color-gray-850 (#1f1f23)` | `--color-gray-100 (#f4f4f5)` | Secondary/nested surfaces |
| `--surface-tertiary` | `--color-gray-800 (#27272a)` | `--color-gray-200 (#e4e4e7)` | Tertiary surfaces, hover states |
| `--surface-inverse` | `--color-gray-100 (#f4f4f5)` | `--color-gray-900 (#18181b)` | Inverted surfaces (e.g., tooltips) |

### Text

| Token | Dark | Light | Usage |
|-------|------|-------|-------|
| `--text-primary` | `--color-gray-100 (#f4f4f5)` | `--color-gray-900 (#18181b)` | Primary body text |
| `--text-secondary` | `--color-gray-400 (#a1a1aa)` | `--color-gray-600 (#52525b)` | Secondary/supporting text |
| `--text-tertiary` | `--color-gray-500 (#71717a)` | `--color-gray-500 (#71717a)` | Tertiary/placeholder text |
| `--text-inverse` | `--color-gray-900 (#18181b)` | `--color-white (#ffffff)` | Text on inverse surfaces |
| `--text-link` | `--color-orange-500 (#f97316)` | `--color-orange-600 (#ea580c)` | Link text |
| `--text-link-hover` | `--color-orange-400 (#fb923c)` | `--color-orange-500 (#f97316)` | Link hover text |

### Borders

| Token | Dark | Light | Usage |
|-------|------|-------|-------|
| `--border-primary` | `--color-gray-800 (#27272a)` | `--color-gray-200 (#e4e4e7)` | Default borders |
| `--border-secondary` | `--color-gray-700 (#3f3f46)` | `--color-gray-300 (#d4d4d8)` | Stronger borders |
| `--border-focus` | `--color-orange-500 (#f97316)` | `--color-orange-500 (#f97316)` | Focus ring color |

### Interactive

| Token | Dark | Light | Usage |
|-------|------|-------|-------|
| `--interactive-primary` | `--color-orange-500 (#f97316)` | `--color-orange-500 (#f97316)` | Primary action buttons, active toggles |
| `--interactive-primary-hover` | `--color-orange-400 (#fb923c)` | `--color-orange-600 (#ea580c)` | Primary action hover |
| `--interactive-primary-bg` | `rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.1)` | `rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.1)` | Subtle primary background |
| `--interactive-secondary` | `--color-gray-800 (#27272a)` | `--color-gray-200 (#e4e4e7)` | Secondary buttons, toggles off |
| `--interactive-secondary-hover` | `--color-gray-700 (#3f3f46)` | `--color-gray-300 (#d4d4d8)` | Secondary hover |

### Status

| Token | Dark | Light | Usage |
|-------|------|-------|-------|
| `--status-success` | `--color-success (#22c55e)` | `--color-success (#22c55e)` | Success text/icons |
| `--status-warning` | `--color-warning (#f59e0b)` | `--color-warning (#f59e0b)` | Warning text/icons |
| `--status-error` | `--color-error (#ef4444)` | `--color-error (#ef4444)` | Error text/icons |
| `--status-info` | `--color-info (#3b82f6)` | `--color-info (#3b82f6)` | Info text/icons |
| `--status-success-bg` | `rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15)` | `#dcfce7` | Success badge/alert background |
| `--status-warning-bg` | `rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.15)` | `#fef3c7` | Warning badge/alert background |
| `--status-error-bg` | `rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15)` | `#fee2e2` | Error badge/alert background |
| `--status-info-bg` | `rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15)` | `#dbeafe` | Info badge/alert background |
| `--status-unopened-bg` | `--color-gray-700 (#3f3f46)` | `--color-gray-200 (#e4e4e7)` | Unopened badge background |
| `--status-unopened` | `--color-gray-200 (#e4e4e7)` | `--color-gray-700 (#3f3f46)` | Unopened badge text |

## Mono Theme Overrides

In mono theme, the interactive and link tokens change based on color mode:

### Mono + Dark

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--interactive-primary` | `--color-gray-100 (#f4f4f5)` |
| `--interactive-primary-hover` | `--color-white (#ffffff)` |
| `--interactive-primary-bg` | `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)` |
| `--text-inverse` | `--color-gray-900 (#18181b)` |
| `--text-link` | `--color-gray-300 (#d4d4d8)` |
| `--text-link-hover` | `--color-gray-100 (#f4f4f5)` |
| `--border-focus` | `--color-gray-400 (#a1a1aa)` |

### Mono + Light

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--interactive-primary` | `--color-gray-900 (#18181b)` |
| `--interactive-primary-hover` | `--color-black (#000000)` |
| `--interactive-primary-bg` | `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)` |
| `--text-inverse` | `--color-white (#ffffff)` |
| `--text-link` | `--color-gray-700 (#3f3f46)` |
| `--text-link-hover` | `--color-gray-900 (#18181b)` |
| `--border-focus` | `--color-gray-600 (#52525b)` |

## Overlays

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--overlay-dark` | `rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4)` | Modal/drawer backdrop |
| `--overlay-light-20` | `rgb(255 255 255 / 0.2)` | Subtle light overlay |
| `--overlay-light-30` | `rgb(255 255 255 / 0.3)` | Medium light overlay |
| `--overlay-light-40` | `rgb(255 255 255 / 0.4)` | Strong light overlay |

## Shadows (themed)

| Token | Dark | Light |
|-------|------|-------|
| `--shadow-card` | `0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3)` | `var(--shadow-md)` |
| `--shadow-dropdown` | `0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4)` | `var(--shadow-lg)` |

## Rules

- Never use hex/rgb colors in components — always reference semantic tokens.
- Status colors should only be used for status-related UI.
- Use `--surface-*` tokens for backgrounds, `--text-*` tokens for text.
- Use `--interactive-*` tokens for buttons and interactive controls.
- Use `--border-*` tokens for all border colors.
- Never reference Layer 1 primitives (`--color-gray-*`, `--color-orange-*`) directly in component CSS.
